sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SFLR Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of Innovator Equity Managed Floor ETF (SFLR), including its stock performance, recent news, and SEC filings. SFLR stock has gained 18.0% over the past year, with shares last trading at $36.52. The article also touches on financial highlights and short interest data for the company.

feed.title: Bio-Techne Introduces Streamlined Brand Architecture to Help Customers Navigate Solutions Faster and With Greater Clarity
feed.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation has launched a new, streamlined brand architecture, organizing its products and technologies into three focused portfolio brands: R&D Systems™, Bio-Techne Spatial™, and Bio-Techne Diagnostics™. This restructuring aims to align with the scientific journey from early discovery to clinical diagnostics, making it easier for scientists and clinicians to find relevant solutions. The new brands will debut at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 and AAI's IMMUNOLOGY 2026™.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Rafael Santana Sells Shares of Westinghouse Air Br
feed.summary: Rafael Santana, President and CEO of Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (WAB), recently sold 60,852 shares of the company, reducing his total holdings to 128,729 shares. This transaction is part of a pattern, as there have been no insider buys and 42 insider sells at WAB over the past year. With the stock trading at $268.89, it is considered modestly overvalued based on its GF Value of $198.56.

feed.title: NiSource (NI) Secures Long-Term Energy Deal with Alphabet for Data Center
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) has announced a long-term energy agreement with an Alphabet subsidiary to supply power for a new data center in northern Indiana, leveraging NiSource's NIPSCO Generation solution. This partnership, set to begin in summer 2026, highlights NiSource's innovative energy solutions and its role in supporting the growing data center sector. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 76/100 and good profitability and growth ranks, NiSource faces concerns regarding its financial strength and a P/E ratio approaching its three-year high, suggesting potential overvaluation.

feed.title: MSCI Stock Price Trades Below $565 as Q1 Earnings Approach and Index Business Momentum Builds
feed.summary: MSCI Inc (NYSE: MSCI) is trading below $565, hovering at $561, despite analyst targets suggesting a significant upside. The company is set to report its Q1 2026 earnings on April 21, with expectations of continued double-digit growth driven by its strong Index division, record ETF inflows, and expansion into private assets and sustainability data. Its premium valuation reflects recurring, subscription-heavy revenues and high retention, making it a durable growth story in financial services data.

feed.title: MGM Maintained by JP Morgan -- Price Target Raised to $42
feed.summary: JP Morgan has maintained a Neutral rating on MGM Resorts International (MGM) and increased its price target from $41.00 to $42.00. GuruFocus indicates MGM is undervalued by 22.6% with a GF Value™ of $49.74, despite a high P/E ratio. Insider activity shows strong confidence with $37.2 million in purchases over the last three months, suggesting potential for growth in the competitive travel and leisure sector.

feed.title: Schwab Considering Prediction Markets Tied to Finance Events
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. is exploring the launch of prediction markets focused on financial events, as stated by CEO Rick Wurster. While competitors like Robinhood are expanding in this area, Schwab's offerings would strictly avoid sports or pop culture wagering, aligning with the firm's focus on long-term wealth building. Wurster indicated that Schwab is monitoring the space and will move forward if it strategically makes sense, but financial prediction markets are not currently a top client demand.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc (XEL) Shares Surge 3.0% -- What GF Score of 80 T
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc (XEL) shares rose 3.0% to $81.05 and are considered "Modestly Overvalued" based on GuruFocus' GF Value™ of $63.76. The company has a strong GF Score™ of 80/100, driven by good profitability, growth, and momentum, although its financial strength is low with a rating of 3/10. Insider selling of $1.4 million with no reported purchases in the last three months suggests caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ:TTWO) Director Sells $85,763.58 in Stock
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Director Ellen Siminoff sold 413 shares of TTWO stock for $85,763.58 on April 15th, reducing her stake by 17.12% to 2,000 shares. The sale was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the insider sale, analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for TTWO with a target price of $284.31.

feed.title: Regional Management (NYSE:RM) EVP Sells $114,522.54 in Stock
feed.summary: Regional Management (NYSE:RM) EVP Harpreet Rana sold 3,009 shares of company stock valued at $114,522.54 on April 14th, reducing his ownership by 6.08%, and an additional 14,978 shares on April 15th for $570,512.02. The company recently reported $1.30 EPS, declared a $0.30 quarterly dividend, and has a market capitalization of $359.26 million. Institutional investors own nearly 99% of the stock, and analysts maintain an average "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Brian Fisher Sells 3,000 Shares of Regional Management (NYSE:RM) Stock
feed.summary: EVP Brian Fisher sold 3,000 shares of Regional Management (NYSE:RM) stock on April 14th for $114,210, reducing his position by 8.29%. The company's stock traded around $38.51, has a market capitalization of $359.26 million, and a trailing P/E of 8.65. Regional Management recently reported strong EPS, though revenue was slightly below expectations, and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.30, representing a 3.1% yield.

feed.title: Brian Fisher Sells 5,457 Shares of Regional Management (NYSE:RM) Stock
feed.summary: Brian Fisher, EVP of Regional Management (NYSE:RM), recently sold 5,457 shares of the company's stock for over $207,000, reducing his stake by 16.44%. Regional Management's shares traded up 0.7%, with a market cap of $359.3 million, a P/E of 8.65, and a dividend yield of 3.1%. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating on the stock with a $30.00 price target.

feed.title: Eversource Energy Schedules First Quarter Earnings Call
feed.summary: Eversource Energy is scheduled to host an earnings conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial performance and business updates. The company will release its financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after market close. Investors can access the live webcast and recording via Eversource's Investors page, with pre-registration available for Q&A participants.

feed.title: Comerica Park getting name change after 2026, amid Fifth Third merger
feed.summary: Comerica Park, home to the Detroit Tigers, will undergo a name change after the 2026 season due to Fifth Third Bancorp completing its acquisition of Comerica Incorporated. While the new name has not been announced, Fifth Third has a history of naming-rights deals with sports stadiums. The original naming rights deal for Comerica Park, which opened in 2000, was for 30 years and later extended through 2034.

feed.title: Silver Lake lists large Dell (NYSE: DELL) Class C share sales in Form 144
feed.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) has reported proposed sales of Class C Common Stock by affiliated Silver Lake entities as detailed in a Form 144 filing. The filing indicates numerous sale transactions in March and April 2026, including large blocks of shares, and notes that some Class C shares were acquired through conversion from Class B Common Stock on April 16, 2026. This notice is a procedural step enabling sales under Rule 144's safe-harbor framework.

feed.title: CEO Bob Jordan joins Southwest's April 23 earnings webcast
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE: LUV) will host a live webcast on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 10:00 AM ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The webcast will feature CEO Bob Jordan, COO Andrew Watterson, and CFO Tom Doxey. Investors can access the live audio and replay through the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Dell (DELL) Form 144: Silver Lake sales and 155,479-share conversion notice
feed.summary: Dell Technologies has filed Form 144 notices for a proposed sale of 155,479 shares of Class C Common Stock, which were acquired by converting Class B Common Stock. The filing also documents numerous past sales by Silver Lake entities, including a significant block of 189,679 shares sold by Silver Lake Partners IV on April 15, 2026. As of April 16, 2026, Dell had 318,358,135 shares outstanding.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty World Expo at Orange County Convention Center | Day 1 recap
feed.summary: The Ulta Beauty World Expo kicked off at the Orange County Convention Center a day after a fire scare, drawing thousands of beauty enthusiasts. Attendees eagerly purchased products, received gift bags valued at $2,000, and enjoyed an event estimated to bring $7.6 million to Orlando's local economy. The expo, which featured 200 Ulta Beauty brands, saw tickets sell out quickly, with only 3,000 available to millions of hopeful buyers.

feed.title: Silver Lake disposals continue; DELL (NYSE: DELL) resale activity details
feed.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) filed a Form 144 resale notice for 2,996 shares of Class C Common Stock, acquired through conversion of Class B Common Stock on April 16, 2026. This filing also details extensive secondary sales by various Silver Lake entities throughout March and April 2026, including large tranches of shares sold on multiple dates. The document lists transaction quantities and gross proceeds for each trade by the selling stockholders, who are primarily Silver Lake affiliates.

feed.title: Alphabet’s Data Center in Indiana Lifts This Utility Stock
feed.summary: NiSource, an Indiana-based utility provider, saw its stock rise after announcing a long-term energy agreement with an Alphabet subsidiary. This deal will power a large-scale data center in Indiana, indicating growth prospects for NiSource.

feed.title: Silver Lake entities to sell DELL (NYSE: DELL) Class C shares in Form 144 notices
feed.summary: Multiple Silver Lake entities have filed Form 144 notices to sell Class C Common Stock of DELL. These shares were acquired on April 16, 2026, upon conversion of Class B Common Stock. The filings indicate planned sales throughout March and April 2026, with examples of large single-day dispositions of shares by various Silver Lake funds.

feed.title: A Look at T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) After 3.6% Gain -- GF Value $21
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) shares rose 3.6% today to $197.12, but have declined 22.8% over the past year. GuruFocus assesses TMUS as undervalued, with its current price below the GF Value™ estimate of $213.99, suggesting a potential investment opportunity despite a low financial strength score and recent insider selling activity totalling $151.1M.

feed.title: FedEx Corp (FDX) Stock Up 4.4% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- G
feed.summary: FedEx Corp (FDX) shares saw a 4.4% rise, but GuruFocus's GF Value report indicates the stock is significantly overvalued by 33.9%, trading at $380.88 against an intrinsic value of $284.36. Despite a strong GF Score of 87/100, driven by high Profitability and Growth, the Valuation rank of 5/10 signals caution. Additionally, insider activity shows $10.3 million in share sales over the last three months with no purchases, reinforcing concerns about a potential disconnect between market price and fundamental value.

feed.title: Exclusive: Valero partially restarts Port Arthur, Texas refinery after blast, sources say
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp has partially restarted its Port Arthur, Texas refinery after a March 23 explosion and fire. While one crude distillation unit (AVU 147) is operational, the larger AVU-146 unit remains shut for repairs after a damaged heater tube was found during inspection. The AVU-146 unit accounts for a significant portion of the U.S. Gulf Coast's crude oil refining capacity.

feed.title: AT&T Inc (T) Shares Surge 3.7% -- What GF Score of 74 Tells Investors
feed.summary: AT&T Inc (T) shares surged 3.7% to $26.40, yet GuruFocus assesses the stock as 22.3% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $21.59, despite a GF Score™ of 74 indicating it's an Above Average stock primarily due to its profitability. The lack of insider transactions in the last three months suggests limited insider confidence, advising caution for investors due to potential downside risk.

feed.title: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Stock Price Down 1.3% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: RTX stock fell 1.3% during trading on Thursday, with trading volume significantly below average. Despite recent positive operational developments, such as successful sensor flight tests and new contract wins, the stock faces mixed market signals including analyst price target cuts, an analyst downgrade, and insider selling. Analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus on RTX, with a target price of $203.61.

feed.title: NLRB Rejects Union Bid to Preserve Victory at Hormel Offshoot
feed.summary: A divided National Labor Relations Board (NLRB) has denied a union's request to uphold a previous election victory at a Hormel Foods Corp. subsidiary, citing errors in the initial vote. The Republican majority on the board cleared the way for a rerun election for the United Food and Commercial Workers (UFCW) affiliate at Dold Foods LLC. This decision highlights the impact of the partisan split within the NLRB.

feed.title: DELL (NYSE: DELL) Form 144 lists 135,097 Class C shares for resale; Silver Lake sales noted
feed.summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (DELL) has filed a Form 144 notice for the proposed resale of 135,097 Class C Common Stock shares, acquired from the conversion of Class B Common Stock on April 16, 2026. The filing also details numerous prior sales by various Silver Lake entities throughout March and April 2026, including specific share counts and aggregate dollar amounts. This notice signifies a planned resale of existing shares by current holders and does not imply new share issuance or dilution by Dell itself.

feed.title: Sanmina's next earnings webcast lands April 27 at 5 PM ET
feed.summary: Sanmina Corporation announced it will host its second quarter fiscal 2026 earnings conference call on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. The live webcast and supporting materials will be available in the Investor Relations section of www.sanmina.com, with a replay accessible after the event. Sanmina is a leading integrated manufacturing solutions provider, serving various high-growth sectors within the Electronics Manufacturing Services market.

feed.title: Saia jumps as analyst action and pre-earnings positioning lift sentiment
feed.summary: Saia, Inc. (SAIA) saw a 6.2% increase in its stock price, attributed to a recent analyst price-target increase to $381 and pre-earnings positioning ahead of its April 30, 2026, earnings report. Despite recent year-over-year pressure in LTL operating metrics, analyst ratings show a positive outlook, with 13 analysts setting a median price target of $400.0. Insider trading over the last six months primarily consists of sales, but institutional investors show varied activity with significant reductions and additions to their holdings in Q4 2025.

feed.title: FAA orders O’Hare flight cuts amid United, American turf war
feed.summary: The FAA has ordered flight cuts at Chicago's O'Hare International Airport amidst a dispute between United and American Airlines. This decision comes as competition between the two major carriers intensifies at one of the nation's busiest airports. The article, by Allyson Versprille of Bloomberg, was published on April 16, 2026.

feed.title: Lufthansa Systems boosts training efficiency with Adobe
feed.summary: Lufthansa Systems has significantly improved its training efficiency for its Lido Flight 4D system by implementing Adobe Learning Manager. This has led to the recapture of up to 125 training days annually, reduced on-site presence, and enhanced customer satisfaction through blended learning approaches. The platform has also fostered a more collaborative learning environment and streamlined administrative tasks, allowing trainers to focus on more meaningful coaching.

feed.title: Costco Dividend Hike Highlights Cash Strength Valuation Tension For Investors
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend, signaling management's confidence in future earnings and strong cash flow. While this move enhances Costco's appeal to income-focused investors, the stock currently trades above Simply Wall St's estimated fair value and shows recent share price weakness. Investors should consider its high P/E ratio and recent insider selling alongside its dividend strength.

feed.title: Regions Financial (RF) director Vines receives phantom stock grant in lieu of cash
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp (RF) director Timothy Vines was granted 1,122.0826 phantom stock units, valued at $27.85 per unit, in lieu of cash compensation. This grant increases his total phantom stock balance to 54,420.6866 units. Phantom stock units represent the right to the cash value of one share of Regions' common stock and will be paid out after Vines' service as a director concludes.

feed.title: Regions Financial (NYSE: RF) director takes fees in phantom stock units
feed.summary: Regions Financial director J. Thomas Hill received 1,077.1993 phantom stock units as part of his board compensation, bringing his total holdings to 21,585.7725 units. These units, valued at $27.85 each, are awarded quarterly in lieu of cash director fees and will be paid in cash after his service as a director concludes. This compensation structure is established under Regions’ Director Compensation Program and Directors’ Deferred Investment Plan.

feed.title: Class-action lawsuit filed against Hasbro after data breach
feed.summary: A class-action lawsuit has been filed against Hasbro following a data breach reported earlier this month. The lawsuit, brought forth by current and former employees, alleges negligence in protecting personal information and a lack of transparency regarding the accessed data. Plaintiffs are seeking damages and restitution from the toy and game giant.

feed.title: Iowa American Water Celebrates 140 Years of Service
feed.summary: Iowa American Water is celebrating its 140th anniversary in 2026, marking a significant milestone for its parent company, American Water. The company plans to invest over $52 million in infrastructure upgrades in Iowa in 2026 to enhance service reliability and affordability. With 85 employees, Iowa American Water is dedicated to providing safe and reliable water services to 225,000 residents across the state.

feed.title: [ARS] AXON ENTERPRISE, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by AXON Enterprise, Inc. on April 16, 2026, outlining details of the filing type, associated company, and acceptance date. It provides context with AXON's stock overview, rankings, recent news, and other SEC filings. The filing generally has a low impact and neutral sentiment.

feed.title: ScanSource launches communications team, partners with Arrow McLaren By Investing.com
feed.summary: ScanSource Inc. (NASDAQ:SCSC) has launched its Converged Communications CX Team and announced a multi-year partnership with the Arrow McLaren racing team for the 2026-2027 seasons. This strategic move aims to empower partners in the evolving CX market by combining technologies and services from ScanSource Specialty and Intelisys. The company's stock shows an attractive valuation with a low P/E ratio and strong free cash flow, despite recently missing Q2 2026 earnings expectations.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Eos Energy Enterprises (NASDAQ:EOSE) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Eos Energy Enterprises (NASDAQ:EOSE) from $9.00 to $6.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, following the company's significant Q4 earnings and revenue miss. Despite the financial shortfall, Eos flagged positive operational signs for Q1 2026 and a new "TURBINE-X" partnership. However, the company faces headline risk due to a recently filed securities class action alleging misstatements regarding production and timeline issues.

feed.title: TransDigm (NYSE: TDG) Co-COO sells 3,900 shares after option exercise
feed.summary: TransDigm Group's Co-Chief Operating Officer Joel Reiss exercised stock options for 3,900 shares at $284.97 per share and subsequently sold all 3,900 shares in multiple open-market transactions. The sale prices ranged from $1,273.85 to $1,294.80 per share. Following these transactions, Reiss directly holds 3,600 shares of TransDigm common stock.

feed.title: J.M. Smucker Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.10 a Share, Payable June 1 to Holders of Record May 15
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.10 per share. This dividend is payable on June 1 to shareholders of record as of May 15. The announcement was made amidst recent analyst adjustments to the company's price target.

feed.title: SANMINA (SANM) executive RSU vesting leads to 2,725-share tax withholding
feed.summary: SANMINA executive Vishnu Venkatesh reported a tax-related share disposition. On April 15, 2026, 2,725 shares of SANM Common Stock were withheld at $154.31 per share to cover statutory tax withholding requirements on the vesting of restricted stock units granted on April 15, 2024. After this transaction, Venkatesh directly holds 20,775 shares.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Trading Up 1.2% After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares rose 1.2% after Truist Financial increased its price target to $332 from $323, maintaining a Hold rating. The stock traded near $310 on lower-than-average volume. The bank reported strong Q1 results, with EPS of $5.94 and revenue of $50.54 billion, but management warned of trimmed net-interest-income outlook and potential limitations on buybacks.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Shares Up 4.2% Following Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares increase by 4.2% after JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target from $190 to $200, maintaining an "overweight" rating. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.82 EPS and $2.49 billion in revenue. Despite some insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant majority of the stock, while analysts generally rate it as a "Buy" with a consensus target price of $177.83.

feed.title: Rivian (RIVN) CEO trims stake with 21,446-share Rule 10b5-1 sale
feed.summary: Rivian Automotive CEO Robert J. Scaringe sold 21,446 shares of Class A common stock on April 14, 2026. This open-market transaction, valued at approximately $346,782, was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following the sale, Scaringe maintains a substantial stake in Rivian, holding over one million shares directly and additional shares indirectly through an LLC and a trust.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord (RRX) digital chief gains RSUs and holds SARs
feed.summary: Timothy A. Dickson, SVP and Chief Digital & Information Officer at Regal Rexnord (RRX), received 5.027 shares of common stock through dividend-equivalent restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 14, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 4,952.035 shares. He also holds stock appreciation rights (SARs) for 1,392 common shares with an exercise price of $168.47 per share, which vest in stages and expire in 2034. This transaction was an automatic share-based award tied to existing equity compensation, not a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord (RRX) director receives additional RSUs from dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord director Stephen M. Burt received 2.165 additional restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalents, valued at $209.35 per share. These units were credited under a dividend reinvestment provision following a quarterly dividend payment and are subject to the same vesting conditions as his existing RSU awards. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 25,340.101 shares, as detailed in a recent Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord (RRX) director receives dividend-equivalent RSU grant
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord director Theodore D. Crandall received an additional grant of 2.165 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 14, 2026, valued at $209.35 per share. This grant was a dividend-equivalent reinvestment on his existing RSU awards and carries the same vesting terms. Following this transaction, his direct equity holding in RRX increased to 8,571.101 shares or units.

feed.title: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) entered into an agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Corporation from One Rock Capital Partners, LLC for $360 million.
feed.summary: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) has agreed to acquire North Pacific Paper Corporation from One Rock Capital Partners, LLC for $360 million. This transaction, announced on April 16, 2026, is subject to regulatory approval. International Paper is a major global producer of paper and wood products, with significant operations in the United States.
